title: Michael Saylor's Strategy Acquires Another 1,587 Bitcoin for $100 Million
summary: Strategy, led by Michael Saylor, just bought 1,587 bitcoin for $100 million at an average price of $63,024 per coin. This adds to their already substantial bitcoin reserves, reinforcing their long-term bullish stance on the cryptocurrency.
body:
Strategy, the business intelligence firm chaired by Michael Saylor, has acquired an additional 1,587 bitcoin for $100 million. The purchase was made at an average price of $63,024 per bitcoin, according to a recent announcement.

This latest acquisition brings Strategy's total bitcoin holdings to a staggering figure, further solidifying its position as one of the largest corporate holders of bitcoin. The company has been consistently adding to its reserves, viewing bitcoin as a hedge against inflation and a store of value.

For everyday investors, this move underscores the growing institutional confidence in bitcoin as a long-term asset. It also highlights the potential for significant price appreciation, as large-scale purchases like these can influence market sentiment and demand.

Investors should watch for further announcements from Strategy regarding its bitcoin strategy, as the company's actions often serve as a barometer for institutional interest in the cryptocurrency. Keep an eye on market reactions and any additional purchases or sales that may occur in the coming months.
twitterThread: Strategy just dropped $100M on 1,587 bitcoin at an average price of $63,024 per coin. 🚀
This move adds to their already massive bitcoin holdings, showing serious long-term confidence in the crypto market. Institutional players are making big bets.

If you're bullish on bitcoin, this is a sign to pay attention. Strategy's actions often move the market. Read more → https://www.cryptocatalyst.news/articles/2026-06-15-microstrategy-adds-1587-bitcoin-to-its-massive-holdings
